videos.title: Semantic HTML: What, Why, How - Kevin Powell
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains what semantic HTML is, why it matters for accessibility and SEO, and how to use it properly.

videos.title: HTML5 Semantic Elements - Traversy Media
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers all HTML5 semantic elements including header, nav, main, section, article, aside, and footer.

videos.title: Why Semantic HTML Matters - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Learn why semantic HTML is crucial for accessibility, SEO, and maintainable code with practical examples.

videos.title: HTML Full Course - Semantic Elements - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Part of the freeCodeCamp HTML full course covering all semantic HTML5 elements and proper page structure.

videos.title: Accessibility and Semantic HTML - Google Chrome
videos.description: How semantic HTML improves accessibility, with real-world examples and screen reader demonstrations.
